description: تحقيق 2: بحث شامل عن ew43 في كل الأجهزة + سجل الأجهزة المقترنة + أجهزة الصوت
command_preview: Write-Output '=== ALL PNP DEVICES WITH ew43 OR bluetooth OR audio ===' ; Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match 'ew43|bluetooth|audio|headphone|headset|speaker|earphone|earbuds|سماعة' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize ; Write-Output '=== BLUETOOTH PAIRED DEVICES REGISTRY ===' ; $btPath = 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\BTHPORT\Parameters\Devices' ; if (Test-Path $btPath) { Get-ChildItem $btPath | ForEach-Object { $name = (Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'Name' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name; if($name) { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($name) } else { $_.PSChildName } } } else { Write-Output 'Registry path not found' } ; Write-Output '=== SOUND DEVICES (Win32_SoundDevice) ===' ; Get-CimInstance Win32_SoundDevice | Format-
